text.title: Capacity-Fit Calculator Output Contract
text.summary: The calculator's output is a sprint-fit-statement plus a row in the capacity-sheet. Sprint planning that lacks both is "vibes planning."

list.item: capacity-sheet.csv row per sprint: sprint_id, headcount, nominal_hours, pto_hours, ceremonies_hours, interrupt_buffer_pct, effective_capacity, velocity_baseline, committed_velocity, fit_ratio, fit_band, notes.
sprint-fit-statement.md: 1 paragraph quoting the fit ratio + band, listing PTO entries, and naming the trim recommendation when YELLOW/RED.
Effective capacity (h) with the four terms broken out.
Committed velocity (h or points) and its source (story-point conversion or hour estimate).
Action: commit / trim / re-plan, with the story(ies) to drop if trimming.

antipattern.description: capacity-sheet row missing PTO or interrupt-buffer column.
antipattern.reason: Violates r1. Reviewer cannot tell whether the term was zero or forgotten.

antipattern.description: Fit ratio recorded but no band; or band manually set without matching ratio.
antipattern.reason: Bands are a deterministic mapping; manual override defeats the gate. Override allowed only with a written exception in notes.

antipattern.description: RED-band sprint committed anyway without "accept risk" sign-off line.
antipattern.reason: RED is a stop-the-presses signal. Proceeding requires an explicit named risk-acceptance, not a quiet decision.

list.item: All four formula terms populated (zero allowed with note).
Fit ratio classified into a band per r4 thresholds.
If YELLOW/RED, trim list or risk-acceptance present.
